property.name: description
property.value: add a comment to current issue

property.name: description
property.value: go to first issue in the list

property.name: description
property.value: go to last issue in the list

property.name: description
property.value: switch focus between search box and list of issues

property.name: description
property.value: move from search box to the list of projects

property.name: description
property.value: move from search box to the list of issues

property.name: description
property.value: move to search box from the list of issues when first issue is selected

property.name: description
property.value: select id, id and summary of an issue

property.name: description
property.value: select all issues (when focus is on the list of issues)
